debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₃ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc 0 1))

failed_attempts:
simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_left_comm, inter_comm] using
    (Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral hr)

have h1 : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₁ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) := (Φ₁_integrableOn hr).2
  have h2 : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₂ r) (volume.restrict (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)) := (Φ₂_integrableOn hr).2
  have h2' : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₂ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) :=
    h2.mono_set (by
      intro x hx
      exact ⟨hx.1.le, hx.2⟩)
  have hsub : Φ₃ r =ᵐ[volume.restrict (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)] fun x => Φ₁ r x - Φ₂ r x := by
    refine (ae_restrict_of_ae ?_)
    filter_upwards [ae_of_all _ (fun x => by simp [Φ₃, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm,
      add_assoc, add_mul, mul_add, add_mul, sub_eq_add_neg])] with x hx
    simpa [Φ₃, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
  have hfin : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x => Φ₁ r x - Φ₂ r x) (volume.restrict (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) :=
    (h1.sub h2')
  exact hsub.hasFiniteIntegral_iff.1 hfin

simpa [IntegrableOn, Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_self] using
    (Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr)
simpa [IntegrableOn, hr] using Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr

simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_left_comm, inter_comm] using
    (Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr)

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₃ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₃_contDiffOn.continuousOn.mono Icc_subset_Icc_left (by intro x hx; exact hx)
  have hcompact : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  have hint : IntegrableOn (Φ₃ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) volume :=
    hcompact.integrableOn_of_continuousOn_real hcont
  exact hint.mono_set (by
    intro x hx
    exact ⟨by exact hx.1.le, hx.2⟩)

have hI : IntervalIntegrable (Φ₃ r) volume (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
    simpa [intervalIntegral] using Φ₃_intervalIntegrable hr
  simpa [IntervalIntegrable, intervalIntegral] using hI.2

simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_comm, inter_left_comm] using
    (Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral hr)
simpa [IntegrableOn, hr] using Φ₃_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr

simpa [HasFiniteIntegral] using (measure_mono_null (by
    intro x hx
    exact False.elim (by
      have : (0 : ℝ) < x := hx.1
      have : (x ∈ (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) := hx
      exact False.elim (by
        simpa using (show (False) from False.elim (by
          exact False.elim (by
            have : x ∈ (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1) := hx
            exact False.elim (by cases this with
              | intro hx0 hx1 => exact False.elim (by exact (lt_irrefl _ hx0))))))))))
